testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/register - Positive Tests Should register a new user dynamically
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/register - Positive Tests Should register a new user dynamically

testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Positive Tests Should login with valid credentials & validate schema
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Positive Tests Should login with valid credentials & validate schema

testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/register - Negative Tests Should fail registration with already registered email
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/register - Negative Tests Should fail registration with already registered email

testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Negative Tests Should reject login with invalid password
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Negative Tests Should reject login with invalid password

testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Negative Tests Should reject login with unregistered email
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Negative Tests Should reject login with unregistered email

testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/register - Edge Cases Should handle extremely long password during registration
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/register - Edge Cases Should handle extremely long password during registration

testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Edge Cases Should reject login with missing password field
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Edge Cases Should reject login with missing password field

testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Edge Cases Should reject login with empty payload {}
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Edge Cases Should reject login with empty payload {}

testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Edge Cases Should reject login with invalid email format
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Edge Cases Should reject login with invalid email format

testcase.classname: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Edge Cases Should handle SQL injection attempt in email gracefully
testcase.name: Authentication API POST /auth/login - Edge Cases Should handle SQL injection attempt in email gracefully

testcase.classname: Protected User Routes User Routes - Positive Tests Should fetch all users list using valid token & strictly validate schema
testcase.name: Protected User Routes User Routes - Positive Tests Should fetch all users list using valid token & strictly validate schema

testcase.classname: Protected User Routes User Routes - Negative Tests Should reject profile access with NO token provided
testcase.name: Protected User Routes User Routes - Negative Tests Should reject profile access with NO token provided

testcase.classname: Protected User Routes User Routes - Negative Tests Should reject profile access with malformed token
testcase.name: Protected User Routes User Routes - Negative Tests Should reject profile access with malformed token

testcase.classname: Protected User Routes User Routes - Negative Tests Should reject profile access with mathematically expired token
testcase.name: Protected User Routes User Routes - Negative Tests Should reject profile access with mathematically expired token

testcase.classname: Protected User Routes User Routes - Negative Tests Should reject access with missing "Bearer" prefix
testcase.name: Protected User Routes User Routes - Negative Tests Should reject access with missing "Bearer" prefix

testcase.classname: Protected User Routes User Routes - Edge Cases Should handle fetching non-existent user ID
testcase.name: Protected User Routes User Routes - Edge Cases Should handle fetching non-existent user ID

testcase.classname: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Positive Tests Should create an organization dynamically
testcase.name: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Positive Tests Should create an organization dynamically

testcase.classname: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Positive Tests Should fetch a single organization by valid ID
testcase.name: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Positive Tests Should fetch a single organization by valid ID

testcase.classname: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Positive Tests Should update an organization
testcase.name: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Positive Tests Should update an organization

testcase.classname: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Positive Tests Should attempt to delete an organization
testcase.name: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Positive Tests Should attempt to delete an organization

testcase.classname: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Negative Tests Should fail creating an organization with empty payload
testcase.name: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Negative Tests Should fail creating an organization with empty payload

testcase.classname: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Negative Tests Should fail creating organization missing required "name"
testcase.name: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Negative Tests Should fail creating organization missing required "name"

testcase.classname: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Negative Tests Should fail to update organization without token
testcase.name: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Negative Tests Should fail to update organization without token

testcase.classname: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Edge Cases Should return 400/404 for invalid organization ID format (string instead of UUID)
testcase.name: Organizations/Workspaces Routes Organizations Routes - Edge Cases Should return 400/404 for invalid organization ID format (string instead of UUID)

testcase.classname: Profile Route Profile Route - Positive Tests Should fetch user profile with valid Bearer token
testcase.name: Profile Route Profile Route - Positive Tests Should fetch user profile with valid Bearer token

testcase.classname: Profile Route Profile Route - Negative Tests Should reject fetching user profile with invalid Bearer token
testcase.name: Profile Route Profile Route - Negative Tests Should reject fetching user profile with invalid Bearer token

testcase.classname: Profile Route Profile Route - Negative Tests Should reject fetching user profile with no token
testcase.name: Profile Route Profile Route - Negative Tests Should reject fetching user profile with no token
